column1: # C-crash bisect (fail-fast ~2min; baseline image, flags only). EXTRA='-' means none.
# Chunked-pipeline N sweep (chunked image, baseline flags). Expect U-shape; sweet spot ~N=8 per TILED_COMBINE_HANDOFF.
# TILING sweep (higher leverage: TC-bound, GMM-dominant). baseline image+flags, arg-only.
# COST-ESTIMATE probes (low leverage: attention-only ~3-5% of compute). Minimal 3.
# Splash BACKWARD dKV tiling (bwd is 6.4% @ 1.04e6 GFLOP/s -- the inefficient half).
